column1: # The structure of bathc-file. It consists:
#    The DB-name may be ommited. But if it is present, the it
#    cancels the name specified in the parameter list.
# Type action is: 0 - Direct performing SQL-command
#                 X - Message for user (The fields ##1,2 - are empty )

column2: DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS db_k2
1_crt_domain.sql
0_COM/2_com_crt_tables.sql
0_COM/4_com_crt_errors.sql
DROP EXTENSION IF EXISTS dblink CASCADE
CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS dblink
CREATE SERVER ccrm TYPE 'dblink_fdw' FOREIGN DATA WRAPPER dblink_fdw OPTIONS (hostaddr '10.196.35.45', dbname 'ccrm_pp')
ALTER SERVER ccrm OWNER TO mb_owner_01
DROP USER MAPPING IF EXISTS FOR mb_owner_01 SERVER ccrm
column4: -- DROP USER MAPPING IF EXISTS FOR mb_owner_01

column2: CREATE USER MAPPING FOR mb_owner_01 SERVER ccrm OPTIONS ("user" 'crm_rep', password 'crm_rep')
